title: Business Email Basics
description: Professional email structure: greeting, purpose, details, closing. Polite, clear, short.
summary_pt_br: Email profissional: saudação, objetivo, detalhes, pedido, fechamento. Claro e curto, sem caixa alta.

scenes.subtitle_en: Professional email structure: greeting, purpose, details, closing. Polite, clear, short.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Email profissional: saudação, objetivo, detalhes, pedido, fechamento. Claro e curto, sem caixa alta.

scenes.text_en: Professional email structure: greeting, purpose, details, closing. Polite, clear, short. Today's focus: business email basics. I am writing to follow up on our meeting last Tuesday.
scenes.text_pt: Email profissional: saudação, objetivo, detalhes, pedido, fechamento. Claro e curto, sem caixa alta. Foco de hoje: business email basics. Escrevo para dar continuidade à nossa reunião.

scenes.title: Business Email Basics
scenes.body_en: Standard structure: 'Dear [Name],' → opening line ('I'm writing to...') → details → call to action ('Could you please...') → closing ('Best regards,'). Avoid CAPS and overuse of exclamation marks.
scenes.body_pt: Email profissional: saudação, objetivo, detalhes, pedido, fechamento. Claro e curto, sem caixa alta.

examples.en: I am writing to follow up on our meeting last Tuesday.
examples.pt: Escrevo para dar continuidade à nossa reunião.

examples.en: Could you please share the latest version of the report?
examples.pt: Poderia compartilhar a última versão do relatório?

examples.en: Best regards and have a nice weekend.
examples.pt: Atenciosamente e bom fim de semana.

exercise.question: Complete: "I am ___ to follow up on our meeting last Tuesday."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I am writing to follow up on our meeting last Tuesday."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Escrevo para dar continuidade à nossa reunião.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Could you please share the latest version of the report?
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Could you please share the latest version of the report?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Poderia compartilhar a última versão do relatório?

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Business Email Basics — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre business email basics. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I need to write my first professional email. Any advice?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Start with Dear or Hi plus the name.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What should the first sentence say?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: State your reason clearly, like 'I am writing to...'

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do I ask for something without sounding rude?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Use 'Could you please...' or 'Would you mind...'

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Is it okay to use exclamation marks?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Use sparingly, maybe once at most.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What closing is safe for strangers?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Short, polite, and to the point. You're ready.

scenes.title: Writing to a client
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the email structure Joca proposed and include one polite request.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the quiet office, Joca opened his laptop to draft a message to a potential client.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: I'm writing to follow up on our conversation from last Tuesday about the integration.

paragraphs.speaker: Mentor
paragraphs.en: Always confirm next steps in writing. Ambiguity kills business relationships.

paragraphs.speaker: Joca
paragraphs.en: Could you please share the updated proposal by end of day Friday?

paragraphs.speaker: Mentor
paragraphs.en: And close with something warm but professional, like Best regards.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Three lines, one clear request, one warm closing — the quiet art of a good email.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Business Email Basics". Professional email structure: greeting, purpose, details, closing. Polite, clear, short. I am writing to follow up on our meeting last Tuesday. Could you please share the latest version of the report? Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Business Email Basics". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Business Email Basics".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
